mapped_skill: shared governance scripts across EvidenceOS skills

positioning.one_liner: Human review, validation, and audit controls across EvidenceOS evidence workflows.
jobs_to_be_done: Route AI-assisted outputs to structured human review.
Support second review, adjudication, and override reasons.
Generate validation reports without making unsupported performance claims.
Preserve project manifests, audit trails, tool metadata, and fixture-only warnings.

guardrails: Do not claim real-world model performance from fixture-only smoke tests.
Do not hide AI decisions that were overridden by a human reviewer.
Do not omit tool, prompt, source, timestamp, or provenance fields when available.
